scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix api && npm install --prefix public-site && npm install --prefix admin-portal && npm install --prefix ceo-portal
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "api,public,admin,ceo" -c "cyan,green,blue,magenta" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:public" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:ceo"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix public-site && npm run build --prefix admin-portal && npm run build --prefix ceo-portal
